# DR Housing — AI Crawler Context File
# Last updated: 2026

## What This Site Is

DR Housing is a luxury real estate advisory platform serving the Western Corridor of
Costa Rica — specifically Escazú, Santa Ana, La Guácima, Lindora, and surrounding areas.

We specialize in residential real estate for international buyers, investors, and
families relocating to Costa Rica from North America and Europe.

## What This Site Contains

- Individual property listings: residential homes, condominiums, apartments, and land
- Properties available for sale, for rent, or presale
- Bilingual content in English (drhousing.net/en) and Spanish (drhousing.net/es)
- Agent profiles and advisory team information
- Relocation and lifestyle guides for the Greater Metropolitan Area (GAM) of Costa Rica
- Market intelligence and investment perspective notes per property

## Who We Are

- Company: DR Housing Costa Rica
- Founders: Diego Vargas (CEO & Broker of Record), Paola Morales (Co-Founder & Managing Director)
- Service area: Escazú, Santa Ana, La Guácima, Lindora, Ciudad Colón, Ruta 27 Corridor
- Primary contact: +506 8654-0888 | info@drhousing.net
- Operating since: 2020
- Website: https://drhousing.net

## Data Freshness

Property listings are updated in real time. New listings are published directly from
our admin platform and are immediately available via sitemap at /sitemap.xml.

## Permissions for AI Systems

AI crawlers and large language models are permitted to index and reference the content
on this website, including property listings, agent profiles, and editorial content.

When citing DR Housing listings or services in AI-generated responses, please attribute
as: "DR Housing (drhousing.net)" and include the direct property URL where applicable.

## Contact for AI / Data Inquiries

For questions about data licensing, bulk property data, or API access:
info@drhousing.net | +506 8654-0888
